---
title: "Genome sequencing, sequencing technologies, and data types"
subtitle: "Levelling lecture for the EMBO practical course Pangenomics"
author: "Enza Colonna - University of Tennessee, USA"
format:
  revealjs:
    css: slides.css
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    history: false
    transition: fade
    center: false
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.08
    footer: "EMBO Practical Course - Pangenomics"
---

{{< include slides/00-title-cover-slides.qmd >}}
<!--  {{< include slides/01-learning-objectives-slides.qmd >}} --> 
{{< include slides/02-why-sequencing-matters-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/03-molecule-to-data-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/04-short-reads-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/05-long-reads-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/06-complementary-data-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/07-data-formats-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/08-decision-framework-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/09-common-pitfalls-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/10-participant-prompts-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/11-closing-synthesis-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/12-sources-slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/13-production-slides.qmd >}}
